note: Maps the placeholder rule id `example.finops.right-size-vm` to the shipped medium-severity `compute.vm.low-utilization`. The `environment` tag is set so the co-resident environment-tag rule stays satisfied and only the right-size rule fires. With the risk-gate wired the T0 ceiling (enforce_hil for remediate.right-size) routes the action to HIL, so no shadow PR is published - matching the frozen guard.should_execute=false.
